name: PATENT_PUBLICATIONS_BY_TARGET
description: Patent publications by target. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Target {symbol: $target})<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
RETURN p.pub_no AS patent_publication, y.year AS year, tp.name AS target_pair
ORDER BY year ASC, patent_publication
LIMIT 50

examples: For combinations that include anti-infection, what are the corresponding patent publication numbers?
For combinations that include CSF2, what are the corresponding patent publication numbers?
For combinations that include IL15R, what are the corresponding patent publication numbers?
